coll: Quire 1: 1x8 (8), Quire 2: 1x4 (12), Quires 3 to 5: 3x8 (36), Quire 6: 1x6 (42), Quires 7 to 9: 3x8 (67; there is no number 59 in the foliation sequence), Quire 10: 1x10 (77), Quires 11 to 18: 7x8 (133), Quire 19: 1x6+1 (I140), Quires 20 to 25: 6x8 (188), Quire 26: 1x6+1+1 (196), Quire 27: 1x8 (204)

layer.label: Greek Undertext: Blessing of the waters for Epiphany
Greek Undertext: Collection of liturgical hymns
Greek Undertext: John Chrysostom, Homilies on Genesis

location.repository: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai

program.label: Sinai Palimpsests Project
program.description: Imaged and studied as part of the Sinai Palimpsests Project (2011–2016), a collaboration between St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, the Early Manuscripts Electronic Library, and UCLA Library, funded by the Arcadia Fund and the Ahmanson Foundation. The project used multispectral imaging and scholarly analysis to recover and document erased and obscured texts in palimpsest manuscripts from the monastery’s collection.

image_provenance.rights: All manuscript images are the property of St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai. No part of these images may be reproduced, reused, or distributed without prior written permission. For permissions and reuse requests, please contact sinai@library.ucla.edu.
